SUMMARY: NESTED | FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD DETAIL: FIELD | CONSTR | METHOD

javax.media.mscontrol.join
Interface JoinEvent

All Superinterfaces:
MediaEvent<Joinable>
public interface JoinEvent
extends MediaEvent<Joinable>

This event is delivered to the application upon completion of an asynchronous join operation.
The application will receive one event for each call to Joinable.joinInitiate(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable, Serializable) or Joinable.unjoinInitiate(Joinable, Serializable) (one call, one event).

Field Summary
static EventType JOINED
          This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a join operation.
static MediaErr NO_TRANSCODER
          Error sent by media server when it is unable to perform the transcoding required by the join.
static MediaErr TOO_MANY_JOINEES
          Error sent by media server when the number of joined objects is too high (value is implementation dependent).
static EventType UNJOINED
          This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of an unjoin operation.
 
Fields inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
NO_ERROR
 
Method Summary
 java.io.Serializable getContext()
          Return a reference on the third argument of Joinable.joinInitiate(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable, java.io.Serializable)
 Joinable getOtherJoinable()
          Return a reference on the "other" Joinable, that was the second argument of Joinable.joinInitiate(javax.media.mscontrol.join.Joinable.Direction, Joinable, java.io.Serializable)
 Joinable getThisJoinable()
          Return a reference to the object on which joinInitiate was called.
 
Methods inherited from interface javax.media.mscontrol.MediaEvent
getError, getErrorText, getEventType, getSource, isSuccessful
 

Field Detail

JOINED

static final EventType JOINED
This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of a join operation.

UNJOINED

static final EventType UNJOINED
This EventType is returned by getEventType() to signal the completion of an unjoin operation.

TOO_MANY_JOINEES

static final MediaErr TOO_MANY_JOINEES
Error sent by media server when the number of joined objects is too high (value is implementation dependent).

NO_TRANSCODER

static final MediaErr NO_TRANSCODER
Error sent by media server when it is unable to perform the transcoding required by the join.

Return a reference to the object on which joinInitiate was called.
